title: Automate to assign Person to who makes changes to Status
excerpt:

posts.author: dsg08 (Denise Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml:
The automations are not conditional to the user making the change as they’re static based on the parameters set in the recipe.
When STATUS change to ANYTHING, assign PERSON who made the change (instead of CREATOR or static to unique user).

THANK YOU!

posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello @dsg08 ,
Introducing Auto Assign App Automate Your Task Assignments for Maximum Productivity!

Imagine having the power to add your board,

• Automation to Assign Person who makes changes to the Status

• Automation to Add Person who makes changes to the Status as assignee

• Automation to Remove Person who made change the status from the people column

But Auto Assign doesn’t stop there. Our developers are open to your feedback to develop more auto-assign automation!

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: Great idea, Denise! This feature would definitely streamline the process and ensure that the right person is always assigned based on their actions. It adds a level of accountability and makes automations much more dynamic. I hope this gets implemented soon! Has anyone else faced similar challenges with the current setup?
